context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. Reference-driver publication posture is now machine-readable through @refarm.dev/cli/capability-index.
current_tasks: @refarm.dev/cli/capability-index now exports buildRefarmReferenceDriverSupplyMap(), mapping session-tree, structured-io, and code-ops to npm/WIT/runtime/crate supply channels.

The supply map is conservative: discovery SDK is exported, @refarm.dev/pi-agent stays on hold while private, structured-io stays behind refarm:agent-tools WIT, and code-ops stays split between plugin WIT and held refarm-tractor.

Validation passed: pnpm -C packages/cli exec vitest run src/capability-index.test.ts, pnpm -C packages/cli run type-check, pnpm -C packages/cli run build, git diff --check, after-edit, commit, and after-commit.
next_actions: Decide the next publication slice for runtime-agent distribution: keep @refarm.dev/pi-agent private, or prepare a policy-gated plugin package candidate with explicit files/artifact checks.
If runtime package promotion remains too early, map the WIT/component distribution path for refarm:agent-tools and refarm:plugin before touching npm/crates publishing.
Keep reference-driver:smoke as the cheap guard when changing session-tree, structured-io, code-ops, or their supply map.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
